parameters.jsonBody:
={ "chat_id": {{ $('Command Router').first().json.chatId }}, "text": "Welcome to IG VIRAL ENGINE

The autonomous Instagram growth system.

COMMANDS:
/niche [name] — Set your niche and start research
/brand — Upload brand identity
/research — Deep niche research
/create — Generate carousel
/post — Post to Instagram
/analytics — View performance
/report — Weekly report
/monetize — Monetization tips
/status — System status
/help — Show this message

Or just chat normally. Tell me your niche to begin.", "parse_mode": "Markdown" }

parameters.jsCode:
const input = $input.first().json;
const chatId = input.chatId || input.params?.chatId;

return [{ json: { chatId, message: `HELP

COMMANDS:
/start — Welcome message
/niche [name] — Set your niche
/brand — Upload brand identity
/research — Deep research
/create — Generate carousel
/post — Post to Instagram
/analytics — Performance metrics
/report — Weekly report
/monetize — Monetization strategies
/status — System status
/help — This message

Or chat normally. Ask about hooks, strategy, growth, monetization.` } }];

const input = $input.first().json;
const chatId = input.chatId || input.params?.chatId;
const niche = input.niche || input.params || 'your niche';

return [{ json: { chatId, message: `MONETIZATION STRATEGY

Based on: ${niche}

RECOMMENDED PRODUCTS:
1. Digital Ebook — $9-29
2. Online Course — $47-197
3. Templates/Presets — $7-37
4. Coaching — $50-300/hour

SETUP STEPS:
1. Create Linktree or Stan Store (free)
2. Add link to IG bio
3. Create link-in-bio carousel
4. Soft-promote in value content
5. Track conversions

RULES:
- 80% value, 20% promotion
- Always give value first
- Test price points
- Use urgency and scarcity

Send /create to make a promotional carousel.` } }];

const input = $input.first().json;
const chatId = input.chatId || input.params?.chatId;

return [{ json: { chatId, message: `ANALYTICS

To track performance, the system needs your Instagram access token configured.

Once configured, I will track:
- Likes, comments, saves, shares
- Engagement rate
- Follower growth
- Best performing posts
- Hook effectiveness
- Optimal posting times

Send /status to check configuration.` } }];

const input = $input.first().json;
const chatId = input.chatId || input.params?.chatId;

return [{ json: { chatId, message: `WEEKLY REPORT

Generating your weekly intelligence report...

This includes:
- Top performing posts
- Engagement trends
- Growth trajectory
- Competitor movements
- Content recommendations
- Next week strategy

Report will be sent shortly.` } }];

const input = $input.first().json;
const chatId = input.chatId || input.params?.chatId;

return [{ json: { chatId, message: `POST TO INSTAGRAM

To post, I need:
1. A carousel generated with /create
2. Instagram API credentials configured
3. Images rendered and hosted

Once the carousel is ready and images are rendered, I will:
1. Create media containers via IG Graph API
2. Assemble the carousel
3. Publish with your caption and hashtags
4. Track performance

Generate a carousel first with /create` } }];

const input = $input.first().json;
const chatId = input.chatId || input.params?.chatId;

return [{ json: { chatId, message: `BRAND IDENTITY

To set your brand identity, send me:

1. Colors (hex codes)
   Example: #0a0a0a bg, #e94560 accent, #fff text

2. Font style
   Example: Bold modern sans-serif

3. Visual style
   Example: Dark minimal, centered, high contrast

4. Vibe
   Example: Professional but edgy

Or upload a screenshot of a carousel you like and I will match the style.` } }];
return [{ json: { route: 'create', command: '/create', params: '', chatId: process.env.TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID, username: 'System', timestamp: new Date().toISOString() } }];
